developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the 5-star review!  
We’re really happy to hear the game was a pleasant surprise — your “PEAK” comment made our day!  
And happy birthday! 🎉🎉  
Glad Build Brawlers could be part of your celebration!

If it didn’t run like a PowerPoint presentation, it was so laggy that you get three frames per second, the entire player base is 6-10yo children, which while being against Meta’s policies is to be expected because this game is free. The average kid will try to cuss you out if you actually kill them because it’s super easy to kill them. This game again is very laggy 0/10 would not recommend.

TLDR: this team has massive potential, but has zero optimization so it’s very laggy and very glitchy part of the glitches I am fine with because it’s kind of part of the charm, but the lag in the low FPS is unacceptable.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share such detailed feedback.  
We’re really sorry to hear about the severe lag and low FPS — we know how frustrating that can be, and improving overall performance is a priority for us.

You seem very familiar with games and optimization, so if you’re open to it, we’d really appreciate hearing more about the situations where the low FPS occurred.  
Sharing any details through our form would help us a lot as we work on further improvements:

Form: https://forms.gle/8oPJh2DmqTs7zxaMA

Thank you again for giving Build Brawlers a try and for letting us know where we need to do better.

reviews.review_description:
Tgd
t
very good

The game’s pretty fun overall, but the movement can be really bad at times. When you dash, it locks you in that direction for like 4 seconds and is just really annoying if you want to change directions after dashing. And when you try to swing a weapon, they feel really heavy and drag behind a lot, even when the item isn't even heavy. It makes it almost impossible to swing anything properly. Devs, please fix this and it’ll be a 5/5 stars for me.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the detailed feedback — we really appreciate you taking the time to explain this.  
We’re glad you like the core concept, and we understand your frustration with the dash movement and how heavy swinging can feel.

Movement and physics tuning are areas we’re actively working on.  
If you have more thoughts or examples, we’d love to hear them on our Discord or through our support form:

Form: https://forms.gle/8oPJh2DmqTs7zxaMA  
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/univrs

Thanks again for playing Build Brawlers and for the honest review.

Toxic kids are running around and im not allowed to do ANYTHING about it. One kid kept roasting me calling me trash and saying i was stupid, AND I COULDNT REPORT HIM! i would give zero stars if i could.

developer_response.body:
We’re really sorry to hear about this experience — that’s not how we want anyone to feel while playing.  
We take toxic behavior seriously.

If you encounter harassment, you can report the user through Meta’s in-game User Reporting menu.  
In the meantime, you can also mute players from the user list to immediately stop voice communication.

Thank you for speaking up and helping us keep the community respectful.

reviews.review_description: Fun game but I wish you could still go to the city map

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!  
We’re glad you’re having fun with the game.  
Starting with the next update, we’re planning to rotate maps regularly — including the City map.  
Hope you’ll check it out when it’s back!
Thanks for the 5 stars!  Glad you’re enjoying it!
